description: The BoxMeshGizmo component is used to resize BoxMeshs in a visual manner using the DevTip.

fields._target: The box Mesh this component is targeting for editing.
fields._cubeGizmo: The visual for this component which is used to edit ``_target`` in a visual manner.

usage: Used to adjust the size of a box mesh. This can be accessed via the gizmo menu using a dev tip in your context menu. The button to activate it is the box mesh option.
